Bus Timings

Route 9 in Sharjah Overview: Rolla to Sahara Mall

March 11, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Route 9 is one of the most important bus routes in Sharjah, linking the bustling Rolla area with the popular Sahara Mall. Designed to serve both daily commuters and shoppers, this route offers a dependable and affordable way to travel between these key destinations. With its regular services and strategically placed stops, Route 9 is an essential part of Sharjah’s public transport network, ensuring a smooth and convenient travel experience.

Route Overview

The journey on Route 9 begins at Rolla Terminal and concludes at Sahara Mall Terminal, stopping at several major landmarks along the way. Key stops include:

  1. Al Jubail Terminal

  2. Central Souq

  3. King Faisal Street

  4. Al Wahda Street

  5. Al Khan Street

  6. Al Tawaan Street

  7. Sharjah Expo Center

  8. Al Nahda Street

Operational Details

Bus Timings:

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Monday To Friday

Al Rolla Terminal

From To From To Headway
Rolla Terminal Sahara Mall Terminal 06:20 08:53 17
09:20 15:20 30    
15:37 19:52 17    
20:20 21:50 30    
Sahara Mall Terminal Rolla Terminal 06:40 09:47 17
10:05 16:05 30    
16:25 19:49 17    
20:05 22:05 30    

Saturday and Sunday

Sahara Mall Terminal

From To From To Headway
Rolla Terminal Sahara Mall Terminal 06:20 15:20 30
15:37 19:52 17    
20:20 21:50 30    
Sahara Mall Terminal Rolla Terminal 06:35 16:05 30
16:25 19:49 17    
20:05 22:05 30    

Ticket Pricing:

  • Cash Ticket: AED 8.00

  • Sayer Ticket: AED 6.00

Whether you’re commuting to work or planning a shopping trip, this route offers easy access to some of Sharjah’s most frequented spots. For more information on other bus routes in Sharjah, take a look at the Full Sharjah Bus Routes guide to explore all available options for getting around the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 11, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
